<!--
Thanks for contributing! Most PRs here improve a lesson, fix a bug in the
reference harness, or clarify the docs. Keep changes focused.
-->

## What does this change?

<!-- One or two sentences. Link the issue it closes, if any: "Closes #12". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Lesson fix/improvement (course/)
- [ ] Reference harness or tooling (reference/, scripts/)
- [ ] Docs / concept page (docs/)
- [ ] CI / repo plumbing

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `bash scripts/check-depersonalized.sh` and it passed (no personal
      paths, handles, or keys — this repo is published).
- [ ] If I changed a `.mjs` hook: `node --check` passes on it.
- [ ] If I changed a `solution/`: it still builds/runs (and its self-test, if
      any, passes).
- [ ] If I changed a lesson README: the 6 sections are intact and any new link
      resolves.
- [ ] No API key, real or "test", appears anywhere in the diff.

## Anything reviewers should know?

<!-- Tradeoffs, follow-ups, things you're unsure about. -->
